Game: The Terminator 1993 THE BATTLE TO SAVE THE FUTURE HAS BEGUN You are Kyle Reese. Your mission: go back in time to protect Sarah Conner, mother of John Conner, leader of the resistance of the future. The enemy: Cyberdyne Systems model 101 - The Terminator. Outside, living human tissue; inside, a hyper-alloy combat chassis, fully armored. It can't be reasoned with. It won't be bargained with. It doesn't feel pity or remorse. And it absolutely will not stop-ever-until you are destroyed! The Terminator brings home all the excitement, tension and non-stop action of the smash hit movie: 1 <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/c65e2b4a-15f0-4a55-91fb-7d1bc37c253b.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/8e4587d8-793f-4c3e-8c85-db4087631fb2.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/190d69e6-a81d-430f-b9b9-b72cf6c6ef66.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/4c235e4a-e8a2-4817-bb32-47b225648bf3.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/1bb40ef2-70b9-403f-91de-3fa2c1981e2f.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/09a41e6d-7580-43d2-82a6-a64c65e705e3.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/cc2e4cad-1ef9-4b41-8d31-69c8baf69b0d.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/02288161-9ccd-4817-a194-35cfd8f0e75b.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/10087269-c10c-4a6e-a2a8-ce2ae2d01045.png Not Rated Action Mindscape Mindscape
